About: It is about a Dutch rap group.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with Mastermind Records.
ConsistsOf: It consists of Willem de Bruin and Twan van Steenhoven.
CreatedIn: It was created in the Netherlands.
HasA: It has members Willem de Bruin and Twan van Steenhoven.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by members of different ethnicities and heights.
It is characterized by rapping in Dutch.
It is characterized by producing its own beats.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by Hip hop.
It was influenced by the album Streetremixes from D-men.
It was influenced by the hit single Wat Wil Je Doen from The Partysquad.
It was influenced by the comedy series New Kids.
IsA: It is a Dutch rap group.
KnownAs: It is known as Willy and Big2.
KnownFor: It is known for its album Youngsters.
It is known for its album De Fik Erin.
It is known for its album Begin Twintig.
It is known for the hit single Slaap.
It is known for the hit single Dom, Lomp en Famous.
It is known for the hit single Vandaag.
It is known for the hit single Broodje Bakpau.
It is known for the single Licht Uit.
LocatedIn: It is located in the Netherlands.
ProducedBy: It was produced by Twan (big2) for 15 songs on the album Begin Twintig.
It was produced by Twan for the album Rock & Roll from Dio.
It was produced by the producer team SoundG8.
UsedFor: It is used for making music.
It is used for contributing to albums.
It is used for making mixtapes.
It is used for creating songs.
It is used for performing shows.
UsedIn: It is used in Dutch radio.
It is used in the Dutch comedy series New Kids.
